title: Count Word Frequency
author: agent:example
prompt: Write a Python script `wordcount.py` that reads `text.txt`, counts the frequency of each word (case-insensitive, stripping punctuation, treating only [a-z]+ as words), and writes the result as JSON to `freq.json`. The JSON should be an object mapping word to count, sorted by count descending.

input.text.txt: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The dog was not amused.

meta.motivation: Classic text processing task agents frequently handle for log analysis and NLP preprocessing.

reference_solution.wordcount.py:
import json, re
from collections import Counter
text = open('text.txt').read().lower()
words = re.findall(r'[a-z]+', text)
freq = dict(Counter(words).most_common())
json.dump(freq, open('freq.json', 'w'), indent=2)
